name: Tramp's Honey & Lemon Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lemon juice and olive oil in a medium bowl and whisk briefly.
2. In a small bowl, combine the honey and cider vinegar and stir until the honey is fully dissolved.
3. Add the honey-vinegar mixture to the lemon juice and oil mixture.
4. Blend in the salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
5. Add the chopped green onion and dry sherry; mix well.
6. Transfer the dressing to an airtight container and refrigerate overnight.
7. Shake before using.
